history.post_text: Today's name is Bhairavaaya. The one who is terrifying and who destroys fear. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutanaathaaya. The lord and master of all beings, including ghosts and spirits. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutaatmane. The one who is the very soul and inner essence of all living beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutabhaavanaaya. The creator and nurturer of all beings in the universe. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutavaasaaya. The one who dwells within all existence, and in whom all beings dwell. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutaduutaaya. The one who sends ghosts and spirits as his messengers. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuurishaaya. The one who possesses great abundance and wealth. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuuridakshinaaya. The one who is deeply generous and grants great rewards. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutaadhyakshaaya. The supreme overseer who presides over all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutapataye. The commander and protector of all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuudharaaya. The one who upholds the Earth. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuudharaatmajaaya. The son of the mountain-bearer; here, an epithet of Bhairava's power. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuupataye. The supreme lord of the Earth. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhaaskaraaya. The one who shines with the radiance of the sun. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhiirave. The one who is formidable and awe-inspiring. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhiimaaya. The one who is of immense and fearsome strength. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuumaye. The one who is the Earth itself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vibhuutidaaya. The bestower of sacred ash, divine powers, and prosperity. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutaaya. The one who has come into being and exists as all creation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuukampanaaya. The one who can make the earth tremble. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuuminaamne. The one known through all the names of the Earth. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutaabhibhaavakaaya. The one who summons, stirs, and manifests spirits. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhaganetraaya. The one who bears the eyes of Bhaga, the Vedic deity of fortune and prosperity. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhavaaya. The one who is existence itself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhoktre. The one who is the ultimate enjoyer and experiencer. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuudevaaya. The one who is the divine presence upon Earth. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhagavate. The divine and glorious Lord. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Rathine. The one who rides the chariot, signifying mastery over the journey. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhraajishnave. The one who blazes with splendid radiance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhojanaaya. The one who is all food and nourishment. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhoktre. The one who experiences and enjoys all that exists. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhikshaabhuje. The one who partakes of alms, embodying detachment. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhojanapriyaaya. The one who delights in food and sacred offerings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutimayaaya. The one wholly adorned with sacred ash and divine glory. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhringgiritine. The one accompanied by the devoted sage Bhringi. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhaktasaadhitavigrahaaya. The one whose divine form is attained through the devotion of his followers. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutacaarine. The one who moves among ghosts and elemental spirits. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Nishaacaarine. The one who walks through the darkness of the night. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Pretacaarine. The one who moves among the spirits of the departed. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhayaanakaaya. The one whose form is terrifying and fearsome. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhavaatmane. The one who is the innermost soul of existence and creation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuurbhuvolakshmyai. The one who is the splendor and glory of the three worlds: Earth, Atmosphere, and Heaven. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutimate. The one endowed with immense divine power and prosperity. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhavavikramaaya. The one whose mighty power sets creation into motion. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Padmagarbhaaya. The one who holds the lotus-womb from which creation arises. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Mahaagarbhaaya. The one who contains the great cosmic womb within himself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vishvagarbhaaya. The one who contains the entire universe within his being. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuve. The one who is the very embodiment of Earth and existence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Abhuve. The one who is unborn and beyond all manifest existence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutatvaaya. The one who is the fundamental essence of all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuvanaadhiishaaya. The supreme ruler of all the worlds. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutikrite. The one who brings forth prosperity and well-being. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhraantinaashanaaya. The destroyer of confusion and delusion. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutibhuushitasarvaanggaaya. The one whose whole body is adorned with sacred ash. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuushayaaya. The one who is the source of all adornment. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutavaahanaaya. The one who has spirits and ghosts as his vehicle. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshetrajnaaya. The one who is the ultimate knower of the field, the body, and all creation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuvanaadhiishaaya. The supreme lord and ruler of all worlds. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutidaaya. The bestower of well-being, prosperity, and supernatural powers. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Bhuutimate. The one endowed with great power, glory, and sacred presence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Prabhave. The supreme, mighty, and all-powerful Lord. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshetrajnaaya. The knower of the field of existence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshetrapaalaaya. The ultimate guardian and protector of the sacred field or domain. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshetravighnanivaaranaaya. The remover of all obstacles within the sacred field of life. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshaantaaya. The one who is supremely patient, tranquil, and forgiving. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshudraaya. The one who can assume a minute form or attend to the smallest of beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshetrapaaya. The protector of the land and the sacred field. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshudraghnaaya. The destroyer of the petty-minded, the wicked, and the insignificant. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshatrapaaya. The protector of the domain and a true sovereign. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshamine. The very embodiment of forgiveness and forbearance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshobhanaaya. The one who causes agitation, shaking beings out of ignorance and inertia. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Maaranaaya. The one who wields the power of death and destruction against evil. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Stambhanaaya. The one who can paralyze, halt, or immobilize any opposing force. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Mohanaaya. The one who has the power to delude, enchant, and captivate all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Namanaaya. The one who is worthy of all reverence, before whom all must bow. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vashine. The one who holds everyone and everything under his control. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshapanaaya. The one who brings about the destruction or expiation of sins. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshaantidaaya. The bestower of patience and tranquility. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshaamaaya. The one who is patient, peaceful, and enduring. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshamine. The very embodiment of forgiveness and forbearance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshetradharaaya. The one who upholds the entire field of existence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ksharaaya. The one who appears as all that perishes, yet remains the imperishable reality. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kangkaalaaya. The one of skeletal form, symbolizing transcendence over the physical body. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaalashamanaaya. The one who pacifies and subdues time and death. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalaakaashthaayai. The one who is the ultimate limit and the subtlest unit of time. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalaanidhaye. The great treasure-house of all arts and skills. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaalaaya. The one who is Time itself, the supreme destroyer and sustainer. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karaalaaya. The one with a gaping mouth and a fearsome appearance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kangkaaline. The one who wears a garland of skulls, symbolizing freedom from ego. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kamaniiyaaya. The one who is supremely beautiful, charming, and desirable. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalaanidhaye. The one who is the repository of all arts and divine qualities. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaalaaya. The one who is the embodiment of time and destiny. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaalaakritaye. The one who is the creator and shaper of time itself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vaayave. The one who is the vital life-breath and the cosmic wind. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapardine. The one with thick, matted, and coiled locks. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamashaasanaaya. The one who chastises desire and rules over it absolutely. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kuberabandhave. The one who is a dear friend and kinsman of Kubera, the god of wealth. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamaatmane. The one whose very being is desire, and who fulfills all desires. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karnikaarapriyaaya. The one who is fond of the beautiful Karnikara flower. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapaye. The one who is chief, or reddish-brown in color like an ape. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamadevaaya. The divine lord of love and desire. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamapaalaaya. The protector of desire and the fulfiller of wishes. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamine. The one who is full of love, desire, and affection. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaantaaya. The one who is exceptionally beautiful, beloved, and radiant. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kritaagamaaya. The author of the sacred Agamas and Tantric scriptures. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalyaanaprakritaye. The one whose very nature is auspiciousness, well-being, and blessed fortune. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalpaaya. The one who is the cosmic aeon and the principle of sacred order. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalpaadaye. The one who is the source and beginning of every cosmic cycle. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kamalekshanaaya. The one whose eyes are as beautiful and captivating as lotuses. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kamandaludharaaya. The one who carries the Kamandalu, symbolizing ascetic discipline. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ketave. The one who stands as the banner of victory and sovereignty. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaalayogine. The master yogi perfectly united with Time. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Akalmashaaya. The one who is absolutely pure, sinless, and untouched by any stain. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Karanaaya. The primal instrument behind all action and creation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaaranaaya. The primordial and ultimate cause of the entire universe. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kartre. The supreme doer behind all actions. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kailaasapataye. The supreme and undisputed lord of holy Mount Kailasa. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Iishvaraaya. The supreme, divine, all-powerful Lord and ruler of the cosmos. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamabhuve. The sacred ground from which all desires arise. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaamadaaya. The generous giver who fulfills all wishes and desires. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Acintyaaya. The one who is incomprehensible, unimaginable, and beyond the reach of human thought. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kiriitine. The one who wears a radiant and glorious crown. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaushikaaya. The one associated with the sage Kushika, or the one enclosed within the five sheaths (koshas). Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapilaaya. The one of reddish-brown hue, and the great sage Kapila. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kushalaaya. The one who is ever auspicious, skillful, and masterful in all things. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kartre. The supreme agent who performs all cosmic acts. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kumaaraaya. The one who is eternally youthful, the divine son, like Lord Kartikeya. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapataaya. The one who can assume a deceptive or illusory form before the wicked and the ignorant. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshamaaya. The one who is the embodiment of supreme patience and forgiveness. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalaadyadrishe. The one who is the first seer of all arts and sciences. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalaadhaaraaya. The one who is the support and foundation of all sixty-four arts. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapaalakanthaaya. The one whose throat is adorned with a garland of skulls. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kapaalabhrite. The one who carries a skull-bowl (kapala), symbolizing ultimate renunciation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kailaasashikharaavaasaaya. The one who dwells upon the highest and most sacred peak of Mount Kailasa. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kuberaaya. The one who is Kubera, lord of all wealth and treasures. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kiirtibhuushanaaya. The one whose true ornament is immense fame and glory. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaalajnaanine. The one who knows time perfectly: past, present, and future. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalaavaasaaya. The one who is the supreme abode of all arts and skills. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kopitaaya. The one who becomes wrathful toward evil and injustice. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaantavigrahaaya. The one who possesses a beautiful, enchanting, and captivating form. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kavacine. The one who is eternally clad in impenetrable divine armor. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kantakine. The one who is thorn-like and a formidable obstacle to his enemies. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaaryakovidavikramaaya. The one whose extraordinary valor is guided by mastery in every action. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaalabhakshaaya. The one who devours time itself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kalam. The one who is the sweet, gentle, and melodious sound or utterance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kaarine. The one who performs and directs all cosmic actions. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kingkiniikritavaasukaye. The one who wears the great serpent king Vasuki as a jingling anklet. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ganeshvaraaya. The one who is the supreme lord of all celestial hosts and divine attendants (Ganas). Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gauriishaaya. The one who is the beloved lord and consort of Gauri, the radiant Parvati. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Giriishaaya. The one who is the sovereign lord of all mountains. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Giribaadhakaaya. The one who can obstruct even mountains, or remove mountain-like obstacles for his devotees. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Giridhanvane. The one whose cosmic bow is the great mountain Meru. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Guhaaya. The one who dwells in the secret, sacred cave of every being's heart. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Goptre. The one who is the ultimate protector, guardian, and preserver of all creation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gunaraashaaye. The one who is an immeasurable treasure of all divine virtues and noble qualities. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gunaakaraaya. The one who is an inexhaustible mine of all excellent qualities. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gambhiiraaya. The one who is profoundly deep, grave, and inscrutable. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gahanaaya. The one who is impenetrable, mysterious, and unfathomable. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Goptre. The one who is the supreme protector and concealer of the universe. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gaayatriivallabhaaya. The one who is the beloved lord of the sacred Gayatri mantra. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gataye. The ultimate goal, final destination, and supreme refuge of all souls. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Griishmaaya. The embodied heat and intensity of the summer season. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Grihapataye. The divine lord of the household and protector of the home. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Guptaaya. Hidden and secret, beyond ordinary perception and understanding. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Geyaaya. Worthy of praise and sacred song. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gavyapataye. The lord of the senses and master of the divine rays of light and knowledge. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Agaaya. Immovable, unshakable, and steady like a great mountain. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ganavaahaaya. He whose vehicle and attendants are the divine hosts, the Ganas. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gunagraahine. He who perceives, values, and graciously accepts the good in others. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gananaaya. Counted and named, yet in truth infinite and beyond all measure. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gunaraashimate. Possessed of an immeasurable abundance of divine virtues. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Agragaamine. He who goes first, leads the way, and stands foremost among beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Iishvaraaya. The supreme Lord and ultimate ruler of the entire cosmos. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Arogine. Eternally free from disease, decay, and suffering. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Khatvaanggine. He who carries the Khatvanga, a formidable club fashioned from human bone. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Gaganaalayaaya. He whose eternal and sacred abode is the vast sky. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Amoghaaya. Unfailing and unerring, with a will and action that never go in vain. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Amogha phaladaaya. The infallible giver of the fruits of all actions. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ghantaaraaya. He who delights in the sacred sound of the bell used in worship. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ghatakapriyaaya. Fond of the cosmic pot, symbol of the womb of creation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Candraapiidaaya. The one who wears the moon as his radiant crown jewel. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Candramaulaye. The one whose matted crest is adorned with the crescent moon. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Citraveshaaya. The one who wears wondrous and variegated divine attire. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Cirantanaaya. The one who is ancient, primeval, timeless, and eternal. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Citteshayaaya. The one who dwells in the heart and consciousness (citta) of all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Citrabaahave. The one whose arms are strong, beautiful, and resplendent. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Acalaaya. The one who is immovable, unshakable, steadfast, and eternally firm. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Chinnasamshayaaya. The one in whom all doubt, confusion, and uncertainty have been completely severed. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Caturvedaaya. The one who is the living embodiment and master of the four sacred Vedas. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Caturbaahave. The one who possesses four mighty and divine arms. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Caturaaya. The one who is exceedingly clever, skillful, and expert in all matters. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Caturapriyaaya. The one who is fond of those who are clever, ingenious, and skillful. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Caamundaajanakaaya. The one who is the divine father and ultimate source of the fierce goddess Chamunda. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Candaaya. The one who is fierce, passionate, and intensely wrathful against evil. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Calaaya. The one who is ever in motion, dynamic, and vibrant with life. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Kshanasancalaaya. The one who moves in a single instant and is impossibly swift. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Acintyamahimne. The one whose greatness, glory, and divine majesty are beyond human comprehension. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Acintyaaya. The one who is inconceivable, unimaginable, and beyond all thought. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Caraacaracaritragaaya. The one who is the divine singer of the tales of all moving (cara) and unmoving (acara) beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Candrasanjiivanaaya. The one who is the great reviver and rejuvenator of the moon. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Citraaya. The wondrous one, variegated and beautiful like a finely painted image. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Umaacaaryaaya. The revered supreme teacher of the goddess Uma (Parvati). Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Caturmukhaaya. The one with four divine faces, seeing in every direction at once. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ojastejodyutidharaaya. The one who bears vitality, fiery power, and radiant brilliance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jitakaamaaya. The one who has fully conquered desire and passion. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Janapriyaaya. The one beloved by all people and beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ajaatashatrave. The one against whom no enemy is ever born. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ojasvine. The one filled with immense vitality, energy, and life-force. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jitakaalaaya. The one who has conquered time itself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jagaddhitaaya. The one who works for the welfare of the whole world. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jamadagnaye. The one who is the great fiery sage Jamadagni. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jalanidhaye. The one who is the vast treasure-house of all waters, the ocean itself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jatilaaya. The one with matted and tangled locks of hair. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jiiviteshvaraaya. The supreme lord and master of all life. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jananaaya. The ultimate source of birth and creation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Janajanmaadaye. The primordial source of all beings and their births. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Arjunaaya. The pure, white, and shining one, like the hero Arjuna. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Janmavijnapyaaya. The one who can truly be known through many births of devotion. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Janmaadhipaaya. The supreme sovereign and lord of all births. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jatine. The one with matted hair, a sign of ascetic power. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Janmajaraamrityubhayaapahaaya. The remover of the fear of birth, old age, and death. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jiivitaantakaraaya. The one who brings life to its end for all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jyeshthaaya. The eldest, the most senior, and the most excellent of all. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Jagannaathaaya. The absolute lord and master of the entire universe. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Janeshvaraaya. The supreme ruler and God of all people. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trivargasaadhanaaya. The means to attain the three great aims of human life: dharma, artha, and kama. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Taarkshyaaya. Like the mythical bird Garuda, swift and powerful. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tadgunaaya. The possessor of all the divine qualities of That, the Ultimate Reality. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tantuvardhanaaya. The one who weaves and extends the intricate thread of the cosmos. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tapasvine. The greatest of ascetics, absorbed in severe penance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Taarakaaya. The great savior, the ferryman who carries souls across the ocean of existence. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Taaraaya. The shining star, a beacon of light and guidance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tiivraaya. Intensely fierce, sharp, and powerful. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Svaatmanisamsthitaaya. Firmly and eternally established in his own true self. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tapanaaya. The blazing source of heat that causes all things to become hot. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Taapanaaya. The one who scorches away all impurities and sins. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tushtaaya. Ever satisfied, content, and pleased. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Shvaanayonaye. The source of the dog, or the one who is served by dogs. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Atandritaaya. Ever vigilant, tireless, and eternally watchful. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Uttamaanggaaya. The one whose limbs and form are supremely excellent. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Timiraghne. The one who destroys all darkness and ignorance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vratine. The one who is wholly devoted to sacred vows and observances. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vedaaya. The one who embodies the sacred Vedas and all divine knowledge. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tanuunapaate. The one who is self-born, self-begotten, and self-created. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Antarhitaaya. The one who remains hidden and dwells within all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tamisraaya. The one who is darkness itself and the destroyer of light for the wicked. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tejase. The one who is the very essence of brilliance, light, and fiery power. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tejomayaaya. The one who is completely filled with radiant light and power. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Stanye. The one who is as nourishing and essential as a mother's milk. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tarunaaya. The one who is eternally youthful and vibrant with fresh energy. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Ardhakaraaya. The one who creates and holds half of the cosmic form, as Ardhanarishvara. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tigmaaya. The one who is sharp, fierce, and intensely powerful. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tattvaaya. The one who is the ultimate principle, the fundamental reality, and absolute truth. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tattvagrihecaraaya. The one who moves within the abode of ultimate truth and reality. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tejoraashaye. The one who is an immeasurable mass of blazing light and energy. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Shatrubaanaaya. The one who is like a deadly arrow against all enemies. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Atithaye. The one who is the unexpected guest, present everywhere and bound to no fixed abode. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Atithipriyaaya. The one who is deeply fond of guests and devotees. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Aatmayogashayaaya. The one who rests in the profound union of his own self. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vyaanaaya. The one who is the vital air (vayu) that pervades and circulates through the whole body. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tiirthadevamayaaya. The one who embodies all sacred waters and holy deities. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Shivaaya. The one who is supremely auspicious, benevolent, and the source of all good fortune. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Sthaanadaaya. The one who grants his devotees a stable place, a firm abode, and an honored station. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tapanaaya. The one who is the radiant, heat-giving sun, the source of all energy. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Sthaanave. The one who is the unmoving pillar, the eternal axis of the universe. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Sthavishthaaya. The one who is immense, vast, and the grossest of all forms. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Sthaviraaya. The one who is ancient, venerable, and eternal. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trilokeshaaya. The one who is the supreme lord of all three worlds. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trilokaatmane. The one who is the very soul and inner self of the three worlds. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trishuuline. The one who wields the mighty trident (trishula), symbolizing the three gunas. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Tridishaadhipaaya. The one who is the sovereign lord of the three directions. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trilocanaaya. The one who has three eyes, representing the sun, moon, and fire. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trayiivedyaaya. The one who is the ultimate object of knowledge, known through the three Vedas. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trirvacah sthaaya. The one who is established in the three sacred utterances: Bhur, Bhuvah, and Svah. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Trivargadaaya. The one who bestows the three aims of life: dharma, artha, and kama. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Duuraaya. The one who is far beyond the reach of the senses. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vaadasthaanaghnaaya. The one who destroys the very ground of dispute and argument. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Durdashaaya. The one who brings difficult and calamitous circumstances upon the wicked. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dussahodayaaya. The one whose rising is unbearable to his enemies. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Paraaya. The one who is supreme, transcendent, and beyond all. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devaaya. The divine and radiant celestial one. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devadevaaya. The supreme deity, the god of all gods. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dundubhaye. The celestial drum whose sound is the cosmic vibration. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dundubhipriyaaya. The one who delights in the sound of the drum. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dridhaayudhadhaarine. The one who bears firm and mighty weapons. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dhanadaaya. The one who bestows wealth and abundance. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dakshaaya. The one who is supremely skillful and capable in all actions. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Duhsvapnanaashanaaya. The one who destroys bad dreams and nightmares. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Durneyaaya. The one who is difficult to know or comprehend. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Durgamaaya. The one who is difficult to approach or attain. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Durgaaya. The unassailable fortress who grants complete protection. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Duraavaasaaya. The one who is difficult to contain or to house. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Duraasadaaya. The invincible one whom no enemy can assail. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Damaaya. The embodiment of self-control and restraint. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Damayitre. The great subduer and tamer of all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Daantaaya. The one who is perfectly calm, self-restrained, and subdued. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Daatre. The most generous giver and donor. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Daanaaya. The very embodiment of charity and selfless giving. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dayaakaraaya. The source of compassion and mercy. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Durvaasase. The one who is the great sage Durvasa, known for his fiery temper. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dvijaaya. The twice-born one who signifies spiritual rebirth and initiation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devakaayaaya. The one whose body is formed from the essence of all the gods. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Durniktaaya. The one beyond blame, against whom no fault can be found. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Durbhagodayaaya. The one whose rise brings misfortune to the wicked. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dehine. The indwelling one who bears a body and abides in all beings. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Daahaaya. The great fire that burns and consumes all things. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Daanavaaraye. The supreme foe of the demons (Danavas). Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devendraaya. The divine king of the celestial gods, like Indra. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Arimardanaaya. The relentless crusher and destroyer of all enemies. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devaasuragurave. The spiritual guru of both gods and demons. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devaaya. The divine and radiant celestial one. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devaasuranamaskritaaya. The one bowed to and revered by both gods and demons. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devaasureshvaraaya. The supreme lord of both gods and demons. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Divyaaya. The divine, celestial, and wondrous one. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Devaasura maheshvaraaya. The great supreme lord of both gods and demons. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Sarvadevamayaaya. The embodiment of all gods, holding every deity within himself. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Dandaaya. The ultimate rod of punishment against all wrongdoing. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Nakshatraaya. The one who is the stars and constellations themselves. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava

Today's name is Pinaakadhrite. The one who bears the mighty bow Pinaka. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Vyayanirvahanaaya. The one who governs and sustains all cosmic expenditure. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Nyaayine. The one who embodies justice and clear discernment. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Nabhase. The one who is the boundless sky and space. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Nyaayaaya. The one who is the supreme principle of justice, law, and righteousness. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava

Today's name is Nirdhyaatavyaaya. Beyond all meditation, yet the very goal of meditation. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Janaardanaaya. The liberator of all people and the one they adore. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Anaghaaya. Completely sinless, faultless, and pure. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Nishkalaaya. Indivisible, whole, and without parts. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Nishthaaya. The embodiment of firm devotion and the ultimate state of being. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Niilakaayaaya. The one with a beautiful dark-blue form. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Niraamayaaya. Completely free from all disease and ailment. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
Today's name is Aniruddhaaya. Unobstructed, unstoppable, and never confined. Jai Bhairava Baba. #Kalabhairava
